benefits.name: COVID Hospitalization Benefit
benefits.description: Lump sum benefit equal to 100% of the Sum Insured shall be payable on positive diagnosis of COVID, requiring hospitalization for a minimum period.

exclusions.name: Diagnostic Admission Exclusion
exclusions.description: Expenses related to any admission primarily for diagnostics and any diagnostic expenses which are not related or not incidental to the current diagnosis and treatment.

exclusions.name: Pre-existing Condition Exclusion
exclusions.description: Any claim with respect to COVID manifested prior to commencement date of this policy or during the waiting period.
